purpose: Verify the local demo runtime after fixing startup and frontend API configuration.

checks.name: dataset_list
checks.evidence: GET /dataset/list returned demo_sales with status ready

checks.name: analyze_debug
checks.question: Show top 10 customers by total revenue
checks.sql: WITH ranked_customers AS (SELECT dim_customer.customer_id, SUM(fact_sales.total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM fact_sales JOIN dim_customer ON fact_sales.customer_id = dim_customer.customer_id GROUP BY dim_customer.customer_id) SELECT customer_id, total_revenue FROM ranked_customers ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

limitations: The live analysis check depends on a valid GROQ_API_KEY and network access.
This smoke test verifies local runtime health; it is not a model-quality benchmark.
